data.input: What was our top product last month?

data.plan: I'll inspect the schema first, then aggregate revenue.
Good. Let me join orders ↔ order_items ↔ products and aggregate.

data.input: {"query": "SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= date('now', '-1 month') GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1"}

data.plan: The top product last month was 'Premium Plan' with $45,231 in revenue.

data.text: The top product last month was 'Premium Plan' with $45,231 in revenue.
